summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of PHP admin dashboard with glassmorphism design. All navigation links, theme toggle, accessibility features, and UI elements are working correctly. Dashboard successfully migrated from /admin_new to /admin paths.

design_issues.issue: CSS selector test for responsive elements not detecting Tailwind classes properly
design_issues.note: Visual inspection shows responsive design is working correctly, just selector test needs adjustment

passed_tests: Glassmorphism UI design with dark theme renders correctly
Theme toggle button works (dark/light mode switching)
All sidebar navigation links work correctly (Producten, Bestellingen, Klanten, Kortingscodes, Rapporten, Instellingen)
Statistics cards are visible and styled with glassmorphism effects
'Nieuw Product' button on Products page navigates to add product form
No 404 errors when clicking navigation links
Accessibility features work (large text toggle, high contrast toggle)
User menu and logout button are present and functional
Statistics cards are clickable and navigate to correct pages
Database warning messages display correctly (expected behavior)
Glassmorphism effects with backdrop-filter support detected
All pages maintain consistent glassmorphism design
